62307.title: Antiques Roadshow : Buckfast Abbey 2
62307.description: The team is at Buckfast Abbey, a Benedictine monastery on the edge of Dartmoor in Devon. Finds include a glorious tiara, a teddy bear with an intriguing secret, and a silver platter that is not all that it seems.

62308.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : The Envious Court
62308.description: Frank and Lu investigate a death threat at Runningbrook, an exclusive tennis club which hides a toxic threat.

62309.title: Father Brown : The Death of the Debutante

62310.title: Ordinary Lies : Joe
62310.description: On the surface Joe seems to have the perfect family life. But when a sneaking suspicion turns into him installing CCTV in his home, he finds that the truth is a bitter pill to swallow.

62311.title: Antiques Roadshow : Buckfast Abbey 2
62311.description: The team is at Buckfast Abbey, a Benedictine monastery on the edge of Dartmoor in Devon. Finds include a glorious tiara, a teddy bear with an intriguing secret, and a silver platter that is not all that it seems.

62312.title: Impossible
62312.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

62313.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : The Chameleon's Dish
62313.description: Frank and Lu struggle to protect a troubled teen who suffers from nightmarish premonitions of murder.

62314.title: Bargain Hunt : Warwick 31
62314.description: Charlie Ross steers the show, which comes from the British Motor Museum in Warwickshire. Experts Richard Madley and Thomas Plant help the blue and red teams navigate the antique and collectors' fair, before they head off to the auction in Lichfield.

62315.title: Bad Move : Shut Up
62315.description: Nicky and Steve's dreams of peaceful country nights are shattered by Grizzo and his band rehearsing his latest album outdoors.

62316.title: Keeping Up Appearances : The Boy Friend
62316.description: Hyacinth gets excited when she learns that her next-door neighbour Emmet is rehearsing an amateur production of the musical `The Boyfriend'.

62318.title: EastEnders
62318.description: Ruby tells Martin she has made her mind up, Mick and Linda have a choice to make, and Keegan's good news leaves Tiffany feeling disheartened.

62319.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : The Chameleon's Dish
62319.description: Frank and Lu struggle to protect a troubled teen who suffers from nightmarish premonitions of murder.

62320.title: Bargain Hunt : Warwick 31
62320.description: Charlie Ross steers the show, which comes from the British Motor Museum in Warwickshire. Experts Richard Madley and Thomas Plant help the blue and red teams navigate the antique and collectors' fair, before they head off to the auction in Lichfield.

62321.title: Impossible
62321.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

62322.title: Bargain Hunt : Epsom & Dorking 10
62322.description: Anita Manning hosts from Epsom Racecourse in Surrey with experts Danny Sebastian and David Harper. The blues are after golden gavels while the reds are spending big. Meanwhile, Anita finds out about the fascinating history of Epsom racecourse.

62323.title: Bad Move : Shut Up
62323.description: Nicky and Steve's dreams of peaceful country nights are shattered by Grizzo and his band rehearsing his latest album outdoors.

62324.title: Keeping Up Appearances : The Boy Friend
62324.description: Hyacinth gets excited when she learns that her next-door neighbour Emmet is rehearsing an amateur production of the musical `The Boyfriend'.

62325.title: Bargain Hunt : Kedleston 20
62325.description: Eric Knowles presents from the grounds of Kedleston Hall in Derbyshire with experts Danny Sebastian and Jonathan Pratt. Two sets of mums and daughters battle it out to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction, while Eric finds out about Derby's industrial heritage.

62327.title: EastEnders
62327.description: Ruby tells Martin she has made her mind up, Mick and Linda have a choice to make, and Keegan's good news leaves Tiffany feeling disheartened.

62328.title: Impossible
62328.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

62329.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : The Rascal Cook
62329.description: Frank and Lu investigate a case of culinary sabotage when a restaurant owner accuses a food critic of giving him an undeserved bad review.

62330.title: Bargain Hunt : Epsom & Dorking 10
62330.description: Anita Manning hosts from Epsom Racecourse in Surrey with experts Danny Sebastian and David Harper. The blues are after golden gavels while the reds are spending big. Meanwhile, Anita finds out about the fascinating history of Epsom racecourse.

62331.title: Bad Move : Get Lost
62331.description: Nicky and Steve are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs through their garden. Grizzo is preoccupied with a new tapping craze.

62332.title: Keeping Up Appearances : A Barbecue at Violet's
62332.description: Hyacinth still wants to join Emmet's production of `The Boyfriend', but fortunately for him, other things have to take priority.

62334.title: EastEnders
62334.description: Ruby tells Martin she has made her mind up, Mick and Linda have a choice to make, and Keegan's good news leaves Tiffany feeling disheartened.

62335.title: Impossible
62335.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

62336.title: Antiques Roadshow : Buckfast Abbey 2
62336.description: The team is at Buckfast Abbey, a Benedictine monastery on the edge of Dartmoor in Devon. Finds include a glorious tiara, a teddy bear with an intriguing secret, and a silver platter that is not all that it seems.

62338.title: EastEnders
62338.description: Sonia lets her guard down as Nancy and Frankie meddle in Shirley's love life. Tiffany's insecurities cause her to make a snap decision. Callum feels helpless, and Jean has some advice for Ruby, who feels like giving up.

62339.title: Mary Berry Cooks : For a Crowd
62339.description: Mary Berry is cooking dishes for a family celebration. She makes it seem almost effortless, with recipes for beef and mushroom stew with mustard mash, salmon en croûte with a foolproof salad, and chocolate and orange panna cotta.

62340.title: Call the Midwife
62340.description: The team tries to unite an estranged mother and daughter who are both pregnant. Also, Trixie's friend is devastated to discover she is pregnant.

62341.title: Summer of Rockets
62341.description: Hannah arrives at Buckingham Palace, but is too late to be presented. Samuel meets two men who are interested in his invention: Denning and Mr Field. He learns that they are from MI5 and he is sworn to secrecy, and the Petrukhins attend a fete at the Shaw's.

62342.title: Father Brown : The Skylark Scandal
62342.description: The Kembleford Ramblers' annual outing takes a tragic turn for the worst when the local lord is found strangled.

62343.title: Mary Berry Cooks : For a Crowd
62343.description: Mary Berry is cooking dishes for a family celebration. She makes it seem almost effortless, with recipes for beef and mushroom stew with mustard mash, salmon en croûte with a foolproof salad, and chocolate and orange panna cotta.
